about.heading: What I do
about.valueProp: I help businesses connect to their customers through engaging stories and powerful images.
about.bio: I am a self-shooting director and D.P. specialized in documentary-style films, corporate and social media content.
about.cta: Please get in touch to learn how I can help you.

documentary.title: Documentary
documentary.description: Authentic, character-driven films that capture real people and real moments.

commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.description: Corporate and brand films that turn your message into a story customers remember.

music.title: Music
music.description: Music videos and visual pieces built around rhythm, mood and movement.

trustedBy.heading: Clients
trustedBy.subheading: Brands and organisations I have worked with.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body1: I am a filmmaker with over 10 years of experience. I am passionate about telling engaging stories that make us connect with other human beings.
contact.body2: I am currently based in Amsterdam.
contact.body3: Feel free to contact me if you have a project you want to discuss.
contact.body4: You can book a call or use the contact form below.
contact.formFallback: Having trouble with the form? Email me directly.
